features: Right Guard Total defence 5 Sport 48H protection anti-perspirant sport new odour block technology fights the 5 signs of perspiration 0% alcohol
description: Product Description Right Guard Total defence 5 Sport 48H protection anti-perspirant Sport new odour block technology fights the 5 signs of perspiration 0% alcohol, new odour block technology, fights the 5 signs of perspiration., Ingredients Butane, Propane, Cyclomethicone, Aluminum Chlorohydrate, Isobutane, Ethylhexyl Palmitate, Isopropyl Myristate, Parfum, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Propylene Carbonate, Linalool, Limonene, Sodium Starch Octenylsuccinate, 2-Benzylheptanol, Menthyl Acetate, Geraniol, Phenoxyethanol, Citral, Benzyl Alcohol, Eugenol, Coumarin Directions Shake well, keep 10-15 cm away from the skin, apply a light, even spray, let it dry before getting dressed, apply for up to 48 hours of protection if necessary. Safety Warning Caution: Pressurised container. Protect from sunlight and do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50°C. Do not pierce or burn even after use. Do not spray on a naked flame or nay incandescent material. Keep away from sources of ignition. No smoking. Keep out or reach of children. Use only as directed. Use in well ventilated places. Do not spray into eyes. Solvent abuse can kill instantly Extremely Flammable Box Contains Right Guard Total Defence 5 Sport Anti-Perspirant Deodorant Aerosol 250ml Manufacturer Contact Information Henkel Ltd., HP2 4RQ.
